_meta.status: DRAFT - needs native speaker review before production use

topbar.backTip: Go back to the previous screen
topbar.noteTip: Jot quick study notes, then copy them into an AI to learn more
topbar.reportAria: Report a bug or suggest a feature
topbar.reportTip: Found a bug or have an idea? Send a report straight to the developer
topbar.helpTip: What this screen does, how to use it, and why it helps
nav.drawer.revision.label: Revision
nav.drawer.revision.tip: A printable high-yield digest of everything due for revision today, plus your saved Crib Sheets.
nav.drawer.library.label: Library
nav.drawer.library.tip: Browse and import question banks curated by the team.
nav.drawer.bookmarks.label: Bookmarks
nav.drawer.bookmarks.tip: Every question you saved, grouped by topic, ready to re-read or retest.
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.label: Mistake Vault
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.tip: Every question you got wrong, kept until you answer it right twice in a row.
nav.drawer.doubts.label: My Doubts
nav.drawer.doubts.tip: Concept points and question explanations you flagged as unclear, resolve them here.
nav.drawer.addq.label: Add question
nav.drawer.addq.tip: Upload and write the question sets students practise.
nav.drawer.ikigai.label: Ikigai Compass
nav.drawer.ikigai.tip: Your living 4-circle readiness map. Passion, Profession, Mission and Vocation drift together as you practise.
nav.drawer.stats.label: Stats
nav.drawer.stats.tip: Accuracy, streaks and progress, broken down topic by topic.
nav.drawer.leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
nav.drawer.leaderboard.tip: See how your week stacks up against other aspirants.
nav.drawer.weightage.label: Exam weightage
nav.drawer.weightage.tip: How many marks each subject carries. Study where the marks are.
nav.drawer.activityLog.label: History
nav.drawer.activityLog.tip: A newest-first timeline of your level-ups, streak milestones, mastery moments and test attempts.
nav.drawer.search.label: Search
nav.drawer.search.tip: One search across practice questions, concept cards, lab values, dosage drills and FAQs.
nav.drawer.studyPlan.label: Study plan
nav.drawer.studyPlan.tip: Set your NORCET date and daily goal, and get a personalised day-by-day plan to exam day.
nav.drawer.reference.label: Reference
nav.drawer.reference.tip: Lab values, drug tables and quick-look clinical numbers.
nav.drawer.premium.label: Premium
nav.drawer.premium.tip: See what Premium will include. Everything is free during the test phase.
nav.drawer.studyMethods.label: Study Methods
nav.drawer.studyMethods.tip: Evidence-based techniques: active recall, spaced repetition and how to use this app well.
nav.drawer.faq.label: FAQ
nav.drawer.faq.tip: Common questions answered by the team, ask your own too.
nav.drawer.about.label: About
nav.drawer.about.tip: Our mission, how the app teaches, and the person building it.
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.label: Send feedback
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.sub: Report a bug or suggest a feature
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.tip: Found a bug or have an idea? Send a report straight to the developer.
nav.drawer.myReports.label: My feedback
nav.drawer.myReports.tip: Your past reports and the admin’s replies.
nav.drawer.settingsTip: Themes, sounds, gestures, reminders, backup and your profile.
quiz.empty.bookmarks: You have no bookmarked questions yet, bookmark a few during practice, then come back.
quiz.empty.reviewDue: Nothing is due for review yet, come back tomorrow.
quiz.coinsTip: Accuracy Coins, earned by studying the 'why', not just guessing
quiz.timerRemainingTip: Time remaining: the chip pulses in the final seconds
quiz.whyBonusBody: You got the mark and stayed to understand the why. That's true clinical instinct.
quiz.bookmarkTip: Save this question to Bookmarks for later review
quiz.revealedBanner: Solution shown: this one stays neutral, so it won’t count for or against your accuracy. We’ll bring it back in your review queue so you can lock it in.
quiz.flagTip: Flagged questions are saved to My Doubts, find them in the sidebar.
home.menuTip: Every section of the app, study, progress, tools, learning and help, one swipe or tap away. On Home, swipe left anywhere to open it.
home.todayTip: Your daily briefing, what's due for revision, reminders, fresh achievements and study insights.
home.settingsTip: Account, themes, reminders, notifications, sound, sidebar gestures, backups and more.
home.guestBody: Sign in to save your progress, sync across devices, and unlock the leaderboard & library.
home.waitlistBody: Reserve your founding-member seat on the waitlist, early batches get everything free.
home.streakSavedBody: You missed yesterday: your grace day covered it. Keep going today to keep the streak alive.
home.whatsNewOne: "{name}" updated to v{version}: tap to view
home.weakAreaTip: The topic where your accuracy is lowest right now. Tap to drill all your weak topics, the questions you’ve got wrong come back first.
home.syllabusCoverageTip: How much of the whole syllabus you’ve touched. Tap for the topic-by-topic breakdown, what you’ve started, what’s mastered, and what’s still untouched.
home.stats.question: question
home.week.title: Your week · {range}
home.week.keepGoing: Keep going: answer a few questions each day to unlock your weekly summary.
home.review.confirmBodyOne: 1 question is due for spaced revision. You'll get instant feedback as you go.
home.review.confirmBodyMany: {n} questions are due for spaced revision. You'll get instant feedback as you go.
home.exam.setNewDate: Tap to set a new date
home.drill.title: Drill Tests
home.drill.tip: All your test modes in one place. Quick, Topic Wise, Mock, Dosage and Advanced, plus previous-year papers.
home.drill.sub: Quick · Topic Wise · Mock · Advanced · Dosage · PYQ
home.learn.title: Learn topic wise
home.learn.tip: Concept cards that teach each topic, learn the material before you test yourself on it.
home.learn.sub: Concept cards · learn before you test
home.levelUp.title: Level Up
home.levelUp.tip: Your progression hub, play the clinical games and the Knowledge Map to earn XP, climb levels and unlock prestige tiers.
home.levelUp.sub: Clinical games · Knowledge Map · earn XP
home.notif.reviewBodyOne: 1 question is due for spaced revision today.
home.notif.reviewBodyMany: {n} questions are due for spaced revision today.
home.notif.streakBody: You've studied {s} days in a row. That kind of consistency is what separates those who pass from those who don't.
home.notif.exam7: The final stretch: trust your prep and keep the high-yield notes close.
home.notif.exam14: Two weeks to go. Tighten up your weak areas and lean on revision.
home.notif.exam30: Under a month left. Steady, focused revision now pays off most.
home.notif.trendingUpBody: Your accuracy rose from {lastAcc}% to {thisAcc}% week over week. Whatever you changed, it’s working.
home.notif.sharperBody: Your {topic} accuracy improved noticeably over last week. Nice momentum.
home.notif.bankUpdatedMany: {n} question banks were updated with new content.
home.reply.fixed: Your report was fixed: thank you!
home.reply.fixedOn: Your report on {id} was fixed: thank you!
home.reply.one: An admin replied to your feedback.
home.reply.many: An admin responded to {n} of your reports.
welcome.pitch.title: Your NORCET edge
welcome.pitch.sub: Sixty seconds on why this beats another PDF.
welcome.pitch.p1Body: Endless notes, no idea where they actually stand or what to fix next.
welcome.pitch.p2Body: Spaced revision, weak-area targeting, real exam-style timing and a clear map of your syllabus.
welcome.pitch.p3Title: Built to feel like exam day
welcome.pitch.p3Body: Negative marking, sectional pacing and topper benchmarks, so the real CBT feels familiar.
welcome.lib.title: Start with the Library
welcome.lib.sub: Find it in the sidebar menu anytime.
welcome.lib.r1Body: Curated sets of questions grouped by topic and source, the heart of your practice pool.
welcome.lib.r2Body: Add a bank and its questions join your tests, stats and revision, and work offline after.
welcome.lib.r3Body: Create custom question sets (Add question / Library) to drill exactly what you need.
welcome.demo.genderTrust: AIIMS applies a strict 80:20 gender quota. We use this only to calibrate your simulated leaderboard rank in your pool. Never to limit content.
welcome.demo.qualTrust: Lets us frame examples for your training. GNM nurses get bedside-to-theory drills.
welcome.demo.empTitle: How does prep fit your day?
welcome.demo.empTrust: We adapt your dashboard. A working nurse can’t sit a 3-hour mock on a Tuesday afternoon.
welcome.demo.windowTrust: We’ll time your daily nudge to this window, a reminder that lands when you’re actually free beats one you ignore. Change it anytime.
welcome.demo.privacyNote: Optional & private · change it anytime in Settings → Profile.
welcome.ikigai.title: What's your reason why?
welcome.ikigai.bodyPost: : the deeper reason you want to become a Nursing Officer. What makes all this worth it?
welcome.ikigai.placeholder: To buy my parents a house. To prove I can do it. To serve my community.
welcome.ikigai.private: Private. Only you will ever see this.
welcome.ikigai.return: On your hardest days, NurseHolic will bring this back to you, in your own words.
welcome.tips.title: Three quick tips
welcome.tips.sub: Little things that make the app yours.
welcome.tips.t1Body: On the home screen, the menu or in settings, press and hold a card for a moment to peek a quick description of what it does, without opening it.
welcome.tips.t2Body: On the home screen, swipe left from anywhere to slide the menu open, and swipe right to close it. Works the same on phone, tablet and iPhone.
welcome.tips.t3Body: Tap the heart on any section. Stats, a drill mode, the leaderboard, to pin it. Your favourites then sit one tap away on the home screen.
welcome.tour.title: Here's what's inside
welcome.tour.sub: Tap any section to see what it does, then jump in. You can reopen this from Settings.
welcome.popup.sub: A quick look before you jump in
welcome.leave.title: Leave the tour?
welcome.leave.body: You can reopen it anytime from Settings → Show welcome tour.
welcome.rows.kmap.title: Knowledge Map
welcome.rows.kmap.desc: Your syllabus as a constellation, practise to light up every star.
welcome.rows.drill.title: Drill Tests
welcome.rows.drill.desc: All six test modes, quick warm-ups to full exam simulation, one place.
welcome.rows.learn.title: Learn topic wise
welcome.rows.learn.desc: Bite-sized concept cards instead of passive video.
welcome.rows.methods.title: Study Methods
welcome.rows.methods.desc: Six science-backed ways to study, and how to use each one here.
welcome.rows.revision.title: Revision Sheet
welcome.rows.revision.desc: Bookmarks digested into one printable page.
welcome.rows.doubts.title: My Doubts
welcome.rows.doubts.desc: Flag anything unclear while you learn; clear it all up in one place.
welcome.rows.library.title: Question Bank Library
welcome.rows.library.desc: Browse shared banks and import questions.
auth.createSub: Create a profile to save your progress across devices
auth.googleSignedPost: : pick a display name below to finish.
auth.recovery.identify: Enter your display name. We'll show your security question so you can prove it's you.
auth.recovery.dob: Enter the date of birth you set when you created this profile, then choose a new password.
auth.recovery.question: Answer your security question, then choose a new password.
auth.recovery.success: Password reset. Log in with your new password, we've pre-filled it for you.
auth.emojiCaution: Emojis and symbols may not display correctly on the leaderboard or in backups. Letters, numbers and spaces are safest.
auth.answerHelp: You'll use this to recover your password if you forget it. Not case-sensitive.
auth.emailHelp: Lets you log in with either your username or email, and helps you recover your account.
auth.warn.google: Your Google account keeps this profile secure, there's no separate password to remember.
auth.warn.create: Remember your display name and password. You'll need both to log in. Your security question is the only way to recover access if you forget.
auth.warn.login: This is a study app, not a secure account. Don't reuse a password you use elsewhere.
auth.consentPre: By creating a profile, you agree to our
auth.legacy.title: Move existing on-device progress into this profile
auth.hint.google: Profiles sync across devices. Your Google account keeps you signed in, no password needed.
auth.hint.create: Profiles sync across devices. Remember your display name and password, and your security answer.
auth.hint.login: Forgot your password? Use the link above. You can reset it with your security question.
auth.link.title: We found your profile
auth.link.body2: Enter that profile's password once to connect Google, after this, one tap signs you in.
auth.err.notStaff: This Google account isn’t linked to a staff account. Sign in with your username & password, or link Google from the main app first.
auth.err.linkFailed: Could not link your Google account
auth.err.noRecoverable: We couldn't find a recoverable profile with that name. Check the spelling, or create a new profile.
auth.err.recoveryUnreachable: Could not reach the recovery service
auth.err.typeAnswer: Type the answer to your security question
auth.err.profanity: That display name contains a word we can’t show publicly, pick another.
settings.guest.tip: Right now you’re a guest, your progress lives only on this device. Create a free profile to back it up and sync across phones.
settings.guest.sub: You're a guest: save your progress & sync across devices
settings.profile.rowTip: Rename yourself, switch to another profile on this device, back up your data, or reset this profile, all in one focused page.
settings.profile.tapToRename: Tap to rename · syncs across devices
settings.profile.syncedBody: Your progress is saved to your account. On a new phone or laptop, just sign in with the same name & password, everything restores automatically.
settings.switch.confirmBody: You will be moved to a different profile. Your current progress is saved.
settings.logout.confirmBody: Your progress is saved and you can log back in anytime. Nothing is deleted.
settings.reset.confirmBody: This permanently deletes progress, bookmarks, stats, and custom questions for this profile only. Other profiles are untouched. This cannot be undone, consider downloading a backup first (Settings → Backup).
settings.reset.rowSub: Permanently deletes progress, bookmarks, stats & custom questions
settings.gestures.intro: Choose how the sidebar opens and closes. Tapping the backdrop to close is always on.
settings.gestures.closeOn: Swipe right anywhere while the sidebar is open to close it
settings.gestures.closeOff: Off: you can still close it by tapping the backdrop or the menu icon
settings.gestures.openSub: Swipe left anywhere on the home screen to open the sidebar, phone, tablet and iOS.
settings.gestures.rowSub: Swipe to open or close the sidebar
settings.gestures.rowTip: Choose how the sidebar opens and closes, swipe left anywhere on Home to open it, swipe right to close. Tapping the backdrop always closes.
settings.sync.signInCta: Sign in to turn on cloud backup
settings.sync.backUpNowSub: Push your latest progress to the cloud right now
settings.sync.msgOk: Backed up to the cloud just now.
settings.sync.msgOffline: Couldn’t reach the cloud just now. Your progress is safe on this device and will back up automatically when you’re back online.
settings.sync.msgFailed: Backup didn’t go through, check your connection and try again.
settings.sync.footer: Backup is automatic: everything you do saves to the cloud on its own, including your Knowledge-Map notes. There are no files to download or lose. To move to a new phone, just install the app and sign in.
settings.sync.rowSubGuest: Sign in to back up to the cloud
settings.sync.rowSub: Your progress is backed up automatically
settings.sync.rowTip: See your cloud-backup status and back up on demand. Your progress: including Knowledge-Map notes, syncs automatically and restores when you sign in on any device. No files to download.
settings.share.title: Share NurseHolic
settings.share.tip: Your personal invite, link, QR and a one-tap WhatsApp message. Friends who join through it appear on your leaderboard.
settings.share.sub: Your personal invite link, QR code & WhatsApp share
settings.spaced.tip: Spaced repetition is the biggest lever for long-term memory. This surfaces a ‘Review due’ card on Home exactly when each topic needs another pass.
settings.spaced.title: Spaced revision reminders
settings.spaced.on: Show the green 'Review due' card on Home when questions are ready for review
settings.spaced.off: Hidden: the spaced-repetition engine still tracks dates, just doesn't nudge you
settings.notif.tip: One switch for everything: a gentle daily nudge if you haven’t studied by your chosen time, plus a ping when new question sets drop. Fine-tune both below.
settings.notif.iosIntro: iPhones only allow notifications from installed apps. Install first: it takes ten seconds:
settings.notif.iosStep2Post: , open the app, and flip this switch
settings.notif.offSub: One tap: a daily study nudge + a ping when new questions drop
settings.notif.nudgeTimeSub: Only fires if you haven't studied by then
settings.notif.contentOn: A ping when the team adds a new question set
settings.notif.contentOff: Off: no pings about new question sets
settings.notif.blocked: Notifications are blocked for this app. To turn them on, allow notifications for this site in your browser settings, then try again.
settings.notif.unsupported: This browser doesn't support notifications. Try installing the app to your home screen.
settings.install.title: Install the app
settings.install.sub: Full screen, works offline, one tap from your home screen
settings.gk.tip: GK and Aptitude aren’t part of the NORCET nursing core, so they’re left out of your accuracy and weak areas by default. Turn on only if you drill them on purpose.
settings.gk.title: Count GK & Aptitude in stats
settings.gk.on: General Knowledge and Reasoning & Aptitude are included in your accuracy, coverage and weak areas
settings.gk.off: Off: only nursing topics count toward accuracy, coverage and weak areas (recommended)
settings.sound.title: Pull-to-refresh sound
settings.sound.tip: A soft confirmation sound when you pull down to refresh. Purely cosmetic: turn it off for silent refreshes.
settings.sound.on: A soft sound plays when you pull down to refresh
settings.themes.title: Themes
settings.themes.tip: Switch between light and dark, and pick an accent colour palette for the whole app.
settings.themes.sub: pick a mode and colour palette
settings.help.tourSub: Quick recap of what each mode does
settings.fav.title: Favourites
settings.fav.onLead: On: heart icons are visible across the app.
settings.fav.onEmpty: Heart some sections to pin them to your home screen.
settings.fav.onCountOne: 1 favourite at the top of your home screen.
settings.fav.onCountMany: {n} favourites at the top of your home screen.
settings.fav.off: Off: heart icons are hidden everywhere. Turn this on to show them and pin your favourite sections to home.
settings.fav.manageSub: Add sections to your one-stop list
settings.fav.orderSub: Reorder how they appear on home
settings.crib.title: Show Crib Sheet after tests
settings.crib.on: Review correct, wrong, and missed questions after every test
settings.crib.off: Crib Sheet is hidden, results screen only after tests
settings.crib.footer: The Crib Sheet shows every question with correct answers and explanations. Like a PYQ booklet. You can also share it.
settings.legal.privacySub: What we store and how it's used
settings.legal.termsSub: The rules for using the app
settings.legal.guidelinesSub: How we keep FAQ threads and the leaderboard friendly
settings.legal.refundsSub: How paid plans will work (everything is free today)
settings.legal.rowTip: Read the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. What's stored, how it's used, and the simple rules of the app.
settings.legal.rowSub: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
settings.support.title: Keep NurseHolic free
settings.support.sub: Free and ad-free · buy me a chai to help with server costs
settings.language.title: राव
settings.language.rowTip: Change the language of buttons, menus and instructions. Questions and study content stay in English, the same as the real NORCET exam.
settings.language.subtitle: This changes the app’s buttons, menus and instructions. Questions, explanations and study content stay in English on purpose: NORCET is conducted in English, so you practise in the exam’s own language.
settings.language.storageWarning: Your device storage is nearly full. This language may not stay available offline until you free some space.
settings.language.downloadFailed: Could not download this language. Check your connection and try again.
settings.language.draftNotice: Translations are early drafts and improve with feedback. If a line reads wrong in your language, tell us with the Report button.
